ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation scenario */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation model */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the simulation */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the simulation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the scenario (e.g., static, dynamic) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the scenario */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the scenario was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the scenario */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loads" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the load is applied to */,
  "load_type" TEXT /* Type of load (e.g., point load, distributed load) */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the load */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the load */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the magnitude (e.g., N, kN) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the load */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the load was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the load */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loads_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loads_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loads_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., stress, strain, displacement) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result (e.g., MPa, mm) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the result was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the result */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, project manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, suspended, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "youngs_modulus" REAL /* Young's modulus of the material */,
  "poissons_ratio" REAL /* Poisson's ratio of the material */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the material */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the material was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the material */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundary_conditions" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary condition */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the boundary condition is applied to */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary condition (e.g., fixed, pinned) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the boundary condition */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the boundary condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the boundary condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the boundary condition */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the boundary condition was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the boundary condition */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundary_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundary_conditions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundary_conditions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who has the permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, project manager) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last modified the permission */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
